title: rubus pruinosus subsp. warmingii
intro: Rubus pruinosus subsp. warmingii, also known as Warming's thimbleberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus pruinosus plant, a type of thimbleberry native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus pruinosus subsp. warmingii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection, making it a valuable addition to a healthy lifestyle. Rubus pruinosus subsp. warmingii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
